parsed_review.summary: CP00-860 is a Risk C, 150-unit descriptor-only "fixture permission matrix bridge" pack (RP28.P05.M03.S19-RP28.P06.M00.S06) for the RP28 Marketplace/Custom AI Apps program. Read-only inspection (Read/Grep/Glob) confirms the pack-level production_ready claim is correctly gated and the descriptor-only/runtime-closed/no-write/no-real-data boundaries hold. MARKETPLACE_CP860_PACK_BINDING (registry.js:309) matches the baseline exactly (Risk C, 150 units, range, upstream chain CP00-859->CP00-860->CP00-861); deliverable distribution (impl 58/fixture 48/claude_review 7/security_audit 13/test 18/hermes 6) and micro-title distribution match MARKETPLACE_CP860_REQUIREMENTS (registry.js:1217). createMarketplaceCp860FixturePermissionMatrixBridgeDescriptor (registry.js:2595) spreads MARKETPLACE_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION and sets authority_boundary {claude_is_final_approval:false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust:false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening:true}; createRow (registry.js:1412) sets every runtime/write/real-data flag to false; the descriptor validator (validators.js:1924) and coverage validator (validators.js:1888) fail closed on any drift, missing rows, runtime opening, writes, or leaked secrets/real data. No filesystem-write/network/exec/eval and no PII/secrets in packages/marketplace. Contract (validation.valid=true, latest_pack CP00-860, no_write_attestation all false), manifest, construction-inspection, adjudication, and command-evidence consistently report production_ready=false pending exactly one valid hardened read-only Claude review; valid_review_receipts and invalid_review_attempts are empty. Hermes evidence packets are control-plane only (emits_runtime_receipt=false, writes_product_state=false); Claude packets are read_only=true and not promoted to final approval. Review-evidence harness is clean: auth preflight passed (exit 0, 1444-byte stdout, valid JSON), tools limited to Read/Grep/Glob, no forbidden tools, summary-only correctly prohibited and not used. Two P3 informational notes only (full 10-command validation suite is deferred to the deterministic post-review run by design; a benign dual-classification of an unrelated stale handoff doc in changed-file-scope). No P0/P1/P2 findings; nothing blocks pack closeout or this CP's goal closeout.

findings.title: production_ready support verified statically; full validation suite deferred to post-review run
findings.details: As a read-only reviewer I confirmed descriptor/implementation/test/contract consistency and the no-write/no-real-data/runtime-closed boundaries by static inspection, but did not (and cannot) re-execute the 10 expected validation commands. command-evidence.json records only the initial rp28:marketplace:validate and node --test as exit 0, and explicitly notes the full suite is required after review, adjudication, and queue regeneration. This is the designed control-plane flow, not a gap in the pack.
findings.recommendation: Ensure the deferred full validation suite (closeout-pack-plan:validate, closeout-pack:validate, npm test, validate, spec:requirements:validate, weighted:validate, fullplan:validate, goal:closeout:validate, rp00:control-plane:validate, git diff --check) passes in the post-review deterministic run before promoting production_ready.
findings.post_review_disposition: Expected by design; non-blocking. Promotion remains gated on the deterministic post-review validation suite plus adjudication.

findings.title: changed-file-scope dual-classifies new-session-handoff.md (benign, no scope leak)
findings.details: docs/closeout-pack-plan/new-session-handoff.md is listed in both untracked_implementation_files (line 155) and unrelated_dirty_files_preserved (line 162). Reading the file confirms it is a stale session-handoff document (cursor snapshot dated 2026-06-08 referencing CP00-082) unrelated to CP00-860's marketplace implementation. active_pack_required_untracked_files contains only docs/closeout-packs/cp00-860 and active_untracked_implementation_files_omitted is empty, so no active pack file is omitted and there is no scope leak; the active scope is cleanly the marketplace refs plus docs/closeout-packs/cp00-860.
findings.recommendation: Optionally refine the scope generator to exclude unrelated handoff/docs from untracked_implementation_files classification for clarity; no functional impact on this pack.
findings.post_review_disposition: Benign metadata observation; non-blocking. No active pack file omitted and unrelated dirty files are correctly preserved/excluded.
